items.claim: Cody Durden will find early wrestling success against Alessandro Costa.
items.quote: I do expect Durden to find early wrestling success in this fight

items.claim: Cody Durden lacks good cardio at the 125-pound weight class.
items.quote: Durden does not have good cardio at 125.

items.claim: Cody Durden's chin is a liability at 125 pounds.
items.quote: The chin is a little bit worrying at 125 lb

items.claim: Alessandro Costa possesses the power to knock out Cody Durden.
items.quote: I think the power's going to be enough to knock out Durden.

items.claim: Zach Reese does not like being pressured or hit with big shots.
items.quote: He doesn't like being pressured. ... He doesn't like it when people throw throw uh big shots at him

items.claim: Zach Reese's durability has been questionable in previous fights.
items.quote: I think his durability has been called into question before

items.claim: Farid Basharat is effective on the feet and a high-level wrestler.
items.quote: the thing about Farid Basharat is just the way that he does fight, how he is effective on the feet and also very good at wrestling.

items.claim: John Gazar has a history of missing weight.
items.quote: he has missed weight in the past. He has missed weight when he's been fighting for Fury FC.

items.claim: John Gazar possesses one-punch knockout power at bantamweight.
items.quote: he does have one-punch knockout power at bantamweight.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez's professional commitment is questionable.
items.quote: I just don't know how seriously the career has been taken.

items.claim: Luke Riley has poor striking defense.
items.quote: The striking defense of Riley isn't really there. ... I know his take his striking defense is terrible.
